documents.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper standard Mutual NDA. A reciprocal confidentiality agreement allowing two parties to share confidential information with each other for a defined purpose.

documents.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement Cover Page
documents.description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, containing the variable deal-specific terms (parties, purpose, term) that pair with the standard NDA terms.

documents.name: Cloud Service Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA). Governs a customer's subscription, access, and use of a provider's cloud/SaaS service.

documents.name: Service Level Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement (SLA). Defines uptime commitments, service credits, and remedies for a cloud service.

documents.name: Data Processing Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement (DPA). Governs the processing of personal data by a provider on behalf of a customer, addressing GDPR and similar privacy regulations.

documents.name: Design Partner Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement. Framework for a company and an early customer to collaborate on developing and testing a pre-release product.

documents.name: Professional Services Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA). Governs consulting and professional services engagements, including statements of work, fees, and IP ownership.

documents.name: Partnership Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement. Governs business partnerships such as referral and reseller relationships between two companies.

documents.name: Business Associate Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA). HIPAA-required agreement governing a business associate's use and safeguarding of protected health information (PHI).

documents.name: Software License Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement. Governs licensing of downloadable/on-premise software, including license scope, restrictions, and warranties.

documents.name: Pilot Agreement
documents.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement. Governs a customer's time-limited evaluation or trial of a product before a full purchase decision.

documents.name: AI Addendum
documents.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum. Addendum to a cloud service agreement covering AI-specific terms such as training data, model usage, inputs, and outputs.
